title: lock level
text: lock level Set the Sybase transaction isolation level. SYS$SYB_PARAMS = lock level 0 | 1 | 3 Arguments 0—dirty reads. These do not acquire any locks, and are not recommended. With this level, it is possible that the result set of a level 0 scan changes while the scan is in progress. 1—allows shared read locks on data. This is the standard Sybase lock level. (Default) 3—the Sybase SQL Server applies a holdlock to all select and readtext operations in a transaction until the end of that transaction. This lock isolation level can cause problems in a multiuser environment, because locks are held longer than normally. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
